task_summaries.task_scope: Measure temporal stability of low cardinality in bulk features e23 to e32 over the dataset timeframe
Compare class-conditioned distributions of bulk features e23 to e32 between attack and benign traffic classes
Assess sensitivity of bulk features e23 to e32 to minor traffic fluctuations to detect masking by near-constant values
Check for potential masking of relevant signals by near-constant bulk feature values e23 to e32 via dependency and relation contextualization
